business_capability: Process accepted tenant work without loss or cross-cell collapse during dependency impairment and recovery.

failure_semantics.during_impairment: Accepted work may queue; it must not be discarded as routine overflow.
failure_semantics.during_recovery: Recovery traffic must remain within the protected dependency capacity.
failure_semantics.tenant_isolation: A fault in one cell must not cause the healthy cell to breach its processing SLO.
